templates.title: Work links → one browser
templates.description: Jira, ClickUp, and Google Workspace always open in the browser you pick.

templates.title: Zoom links → Zoom app
templates.description: Turns on the Zoom deep link: meeting links open the native app instead of a browser tab.

templates.title: Spotify links → Spotify app
templates.description: Turns on the Spotify deep link: tracks, albums, and playlists open in the app.

templates.title: Links from Terminal → your dev browser
templates.description: URLs clicked in Terminal or iTerm open in the browser you pick (handy for localhost).
